goal: Live-verify the two unverified bugs flagged in HANDOFF (BUG-001 reading.html?l=th renders EN; BUG-004 Ask-a-question Other topic drops per-card meanings) before any fix
done: Browser-verified both on production via Chrome DevTools MCP and closed both records in docs/open-bugs.md. BUG-001 already fixed (b9d1700: getUrlLanguage reads l=); BUG-004 not reproduced — Other topic maps to standalone_* fields and renders per-card meanings by design.
symptom: BUG-001: reading.html?l=th reported rendering English. BUG-004: Other question topic reported missing per-card meanings.
root_cause: BUG-001: already resolved in b9d1700 (js/common.js getUrlLanguage now reads params.get('lang')||params.get('l')). BUG-004: never a defect — js/reading-helpers.js:181 maps topic 'other' to standalone_<position>_<lang> fields, a mapping present since commit 245c724 which predates the 2026-05-02 filing.
verified: chrome-devtools-mcp reading.html?m=d&c=1u&l=th -> documentElement.lang=th, Thai i18n, l=th preserved in canonical URL
chrome-devtools-mcp reading.html?m=q&t=o&c=1u,2u,3u -> per-card Past/Present/Future meanings render
side-by-side vs t=l (Love): same core meanings, Love adds extra perspective block only
notes: Doc-only commit. No code changed. BUG-004 leaves an optional product question: whether Other should surface a generic perspective block (feature, not bug).
